blended.narrative: Granite Peak is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
